ksa_text: Knowledge of evaluation dataset design principles, including test set construction to avoid contamination, representative sampling methodologies, edge case coverage, and coverage gap measurement.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

top_anchors.element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Risk Management KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.405) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Engineering. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Engineering roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Risk Management is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Data Engineering. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Data Engineering competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.405) and edge-domain placement (Risk Management) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Data Engineering. All passes support exclusion.
